subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Whatsoever thou seest and findest in this mortal world is but fancy and vain imaginings, not heavenly reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی ، آنچه بينی و يابی در اين جهان فانی اوهام و مجاز خالی است نه حقيقت آسمانی
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @transcending the material condition, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
